creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am going to close it myself, and tag it as rejected.

As pointed by mat@ and swills@ on https://reviews.freebsd.org/D12524, additional Go libraries/sources are kinda not allowed to be installed and only one port needs to be created (security/obfs4proxy).

Thank you all.

Kindest regards,
Vinícius
